_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

preauth.label: Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, clinical photographs (intraoral & extraoral) indications for doing the procedure & advise for admission)
X-ray of the necrotic area in 2 planes or CT.

claim.label: Procedure note/ operative note & Anesthesia notes where applicable.

ppd_preauth.q: Are the Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, clinical photographs (intraoral & extraoral) indications for doing the procedure & advise for admission submitted?
Was the X-ray report of necrotic area submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Do OT notes detail the steps of surgery performed and outcomes of the surgery?
Are the documents available to show appropriate post-op care, advise including for follow-up?

common_queries: Signs, symptoms, examination, x-ray, or histopathology do not confirm the presence of osteomyelitis/necrotic tissue in the oral cavity region.
Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, examination findings, clinical photographs (intraoral & extraoral) indications for doing the procedure & advise for admission) are missing or incomplete.
X-ray of the necrotic area in 2 planes or CT is missing or incomplete.
Histopathology/Microbiology Investigation of necrotic tissue is missing or incomplete.
Indoor case papers are missing or incomplete.
Procedure note/ operative note or Anesthesia notes are missing or incomplete.
Detailed Discharge summary is missing or incomplete.
OT notes do not detail the steps of surgery performed and outcomes of the surgery.
Documents for appropriate post-op care or follow-up advice are not available.

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for Surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, examination.
complications: Discontinuity defects: defects can be spontaneous
